name: rulesets-cli
description: CLI for Rulesets compiler with auto-discovery of .rule.md files

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --minify && tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --skipLibCheck src/index.ts
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --watch & tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --skipLibCheck --watch src/index.ts
